content:
Hi! Thank you for checking out my portfolio!
I’m a recent graduate of Brock University and Niagara College’s dual degree: GAME Programming.
I have primarily done Gameplay Programming, Sound Implementation, as well as General Programming across projects that I’ve worked on.
Contact: atran6734@gmail.com

Cave Crashers is a 2D Top Down, Local Co-op, Wave shooter where you and a friend play as star-nosed moles who shoot bugs, collects gems, and survive for as long as you can.
Role: Generalist Programmer, Sound Designer
Contributions:
Created and Integrated Sound effects for the game using Audacity Developed Gameplay Mechanics and performed bugfixing Contributed work on Options, Main Menu, and Navigation map UI elements Link to: Cave Crashers
title: Cave Crashers

content:
The Last Call is Fast-Paced, VR, Service-game. Set in a fantasy setting, Take up the role of the “Potion Master”, serving potions to Goblin and Dwarven patrons at the Gingers Ale. As the last call for potions rolls in, Can you serve them all before the night ends?
Roles: General Programmer
Contributions:
Sourced and Implemented music and sound effects like the cauldron, enchantment table, and voice lines for Dwarf Characters Developed Gameplay mechanics such as the Bar taps that fill bottles with liquids Ensured Meta Quest 3 VR headset worked correctly and perfomed bug fixing Link to: TheLastCall
title: The Last Call

content:
Dino Dash is a 2D Platformer where you play as Lil’ Guy - a little red raptor trying to make his way back to his nest after being chased away from his home by a huge T-Rex. Navigate the world through platforming, dashing, and eating to keep to your energy up.
Role: Lead Programmer
Contributions:
Developed Gameplay mechanics like the dash mechanic to create a fluid movement system Sourced Music and Sound effects for the game Responsible for developing how the enemies behaved Link to: Dino Dash
title: Dino Dash
